A function checks number status. It uses modulus to find status.  
A prime has no divisors status. A composite has more status.  
* * *  
A loop runs from two status. A remainder shows status.  
A zero remainder means status. A non-zero means status.  
* * *  
A function returns status. A boolean shows status.  
A True means prime status. A False means composite status.
